name: Scrap Dealer Simulator
short_description: Start from scratch and rise with scrap, dig through trash, process junk, and grow your profits. Buy warehouses, machines, and vehicles to build your own recycling empire.
detailed_description:
Turn scrap into fortune and build your junk empire!

Left with nothing but debt, you take over your grandfather’s old scrapyard. The place is falling apart, but it’s your only chance to start fresh. With rusty machines and a pile of junk, you must collect scrap, dismantle old items, and create valuable materials to sell at the second-hand shop.

Survival won’t be easy—you must manage hunger and thirst while expanding your business. Earn money to upgrade your scrapyard with new production stations, bigger storage spaces, and better vehicles to transport more scrap. Take risks by buying abandoned warehouses—you never know what treasures (or junk) you might find inside!

What Can You Do?

🔧 Collect & Dismantle Scrap: Gather abandoned metals, machines, and old appliances, then break them down for useful materials.
🚛 Drive & Transport: Upgrade your vehicles to carry more scrap and boost efficiency.
💰 Sell & Earn Money: Process materials and sell them at the second-hand shop for profit.
🍽 Survive & Manage Needs: Keep an eye on your hunger and thirst—you need money to stay alive!
🏭 Expand Your Business: Unlock new production stations, storage areas, and machines.
🏚 Buy & Explore Warehouses: Take a gamble by purchasing warehouses filled with unknown items—will you strike gold or just find more junk?
🛠 Process & Upgrade Scrap: Convert raw materials into high-value products for bigger profits.
🌎 Explore & Find Hidden Treasures: Roam the town and discover new scrap sources.

Becoming a successful scrap dealer isn’t easy. Work hard, upgrade your business, pay off your debts, and turn junk into gold!

👉 Collect scrap, grow your business, survive, and build your scrapyard empire!

supported_languages: English, Turkish, German, Russian, Spanish - Spain, French, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal
